name: Century Golf Lounge
about: Century Golf Lounge, located within Century Lanes & Lounge, is a family-owned entertainment venue in Victoria, Texas, offering indoor golf simulation alongside bowling. The venue features multiple modern golf simulator rooms equipped with large projection screens, providing a space for golfers to play virtual golf in a relaxed, social environment. As part of a larger entertainment complex, it combines golf with food, drinks, and other family-friendly activities, making it a versatile destination for casual play and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Modern golf simulator rooms with large projection screens for immersive gameplay
Convenient all-in-one location combining golf with food and entertainment options
Family-friendly environment suitable for casual play and group events
Part of a established entertainment venue with a proven track record since the 1980s

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen serving food, menu available for download
No information about alcohol service provided

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It's recommended to contact the venue directly for this information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers an on-site kitchen and food service, with a downloadable menu available. There is no mention of outside food or drinks being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information about the duration of an 18-hole round. This information may vary based on simulator usage and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Century Golf Lounge is explicitly described as family-friendly and part of a premier family-owned entertainment destination, making it suitable for children.
